title: Mine X Farm Regen
description: Mine X Farm Regen Is A Block Regenerating Plugin With Top Tier Features Like Regions , Ingame Editor and Complete Customization And Updated to latest minecraft version 1.20.1.
body:
## ⭐ Premium

**[Mine X Farm Regen Ultimate](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/mine-x-farm-regen-ultimate.110552/)**

---

## Mine X Farm Regen Plugin
*Effortless Block Regeneration for Minecraft Servers* ⛏️

---

### Welcome
Welcome to Mine X Farm Regen Plugin Page! Easily set up block regeneration areas on your Minecraft server and enhance your players' experience.

✨ This plugin operates on the basis of regions, known as cuboid boxes, allowing you to control block regeneration within specific areas. Customize various aspects, including drop items, drop amounts, drop experience, drop names, drop lore, delay settings, regions, money rewards, and much more.

With over 10k downloads and endorsed by popular YouTubers like KasaiSora and Server Miner, Mine X Farm Regen Plugin has gained the trust of the Minecraft community. For your convenience, we provide high-quality support through our dedicated Discord server. We take pride in our ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ ratings on the Spigot page, reflecting the satisfaction of our users.

---

### Installation
1. Click the **Download** button to get the Mine X Farm Regen Plugin jar file.
2. Navigate to your server's plugin folder.
3. Drag and drop the downloaded jar file into the plugin folder.
4. Ensure that your server version is **1.17 to 1.20 or above**.
5. Mine X Farm Regen Plugin has **no dependencies**, making it hassle-free to install.
6. To enable money rewards, install **Vault** and an economy plugin such as **EssentialsX**.

---

### Features
Take control of block regeneration in Minecraft with support for:
- Ore variants
- Wood variants
- Farm crops
- Copper variants
- Stone
- Deepslate

Our plugin provides an intuitive **in-game GUI** that allows you to effortlessly add blocks to the regeneration process. No external configuration files required.

---

### Usage
1. Use the region wand to select the desired area.
2. Create a region within the selected area.
3. Open the regen edit GUI and customize drop amount, delay, and other settings.

✨ Fully customize block regeneration to suit your server’s needs.

---

## Commands
```
/regen wand       - Acquire a region selection wand
/regen pos1       - Set first position
/regen pos2       - Set second position
/regen create     - Create a new regen region
/regen delete     - Delete an existing region
/regen reload     - Reload the plugin
/regen menu       - Open the Regen GUI
/regen version    - Check plugin version
```

---

## Permission Nodes
- `regen.reload` – Reload plugin configuration
- `regen.positions` – Set Pos1 and Pos2
- `regen.create` – Create regions
- `regen.delete` – Delete regions
- `regen.menu` – Open Regen Menu

**Note:** OP players bypass all permission checks.

---
